# CWE-90 positive: LDAP filter built via string concat
lang: go
file: CWE-90-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-90 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query
// Vulnerable line: uid embedded directly into filter string.
func SearchDirectory(c *gin.Context, dial func(string) error) {
	uid := c.Query("uid")
	filter := fmt.Sprintf("(&(objectClass=user)(uid=%s))", uid)
	if err := dial(filter); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": "ldap"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
}
